title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zappfresh - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zappfresh - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, Zappfresh in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Zappfresh:
Zappfresh is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zappfresh!
